author: cristian_1337
content:
This is a great initiative! Also dropping the living design document that will accompany our project work (mine and <@545974882547269641>'s) on the FOCIL implementation in Lighthouse. It has our rationale for each change needed, as well as the currently-open questions and concerns. We'll keep improving it as we go through the project

Any feedback is very welcome as well
https://hackmd.io/@conache/HyDlczNXGl
